name: @insitue/claude-plugin
description: Drive Claude (Code AND Desktop) from the InSitue browser overlay — pick an element in your app, claude reads the file and proposes the edit.

scripts.build: tsup src/dispatcher.ts src/mcp-server.ts src/setup-cli.ts --format esm --clean --external @modelcontextprotocol/sdk --external ws --external zod
scripts.dev: tsup src/dispatcher.ts src/mcp-server.ts src/setup-cli.ts --format esm --watch --external @modelcontextprotocol/sdk --external ws --external zod
